prestazioni: AMG M297 7.3L V12 engine recalibrated with a Motec M150 ECU featuring a bespoke 24,000 RPM ignition cut limiter removal, paired with a custom titanium valvetrain by JP Performance to handle 9,500 RPM redline with reinforced titanium valves, Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet aluminum crankshaft by Manley Performance

Dual Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers with 76mm compressor wheels, custom 1.25 A/R turbine housings, and Tial MV-R 60mm wastegates, feeding into a custom 4.5-inch titanium exhaust system by Capristo with integrated 200-cell catalytic converters and secondary air injection delete for optimized scavenging

Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping, Pagani-specific spring rates (1200 lbs/in front, 1400 lbs/in rear), and spherical bearing top mounts by Radium Engineering, paired with a custom carbon fiber front sway bar by Dymag and a rear sway bar by H&R with adjustable blade positions
estetica: Full carbon fiber bodywork with a custom 'Absolute' aero package by Novitec Torado, including a 3D-printed front splitter with integrated canards, a rear diffuser with active Gurney flaps, and a fixed rear wing with a 1.2m chord and NACA duct side profiles for optimized downforce (1,800 lbs at 200 mph)

Bespoke 20-inch front and 21-inch rear forged magnesium wheels by APP Tech, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (265/30 R20 front, 345/25 R21 rear) with custom tread patterns for heat dissipation, paired with Pagani-specific titanium wheel nuts by BBS

Custom interior by Sabelt featuring a full carbon fiber monocoque with Alcantara-wrapped roll cage, 6-point harnesses with FIA 8862-2009 certification, and a digital dash by AIM MXS Strada with a bespoke 'Absolute' theme, including real-time telemetry for turbo boost, oil pressure, and G-forces
